from sympy.codegen.ast import String, QuotedString, Comment
s = String('foobar')
print('args=', s.args)
print('kwargs=', s.kwargs())
for cls in (String, QuotedString, Comment):
    x = cls('foobar')

    except Exception as exc:
        print(cls.__name__, type(exc).__name__, str(exc))

./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import pickle
from sympy.codegen.ast import String, QuotedString, Comment
from sympy.core.symbol import Str
for obj in [String('x'), QuotedString('x'), Comment('x'), Str('x')]:
    try:
        p = pickle.dumps(obj)
        y = pickle.loads(p)
        print(type(obj).__name__, 'pickle ok', y == obj, y, y.args)
    except Exception as exc:
        print(type(obj).__name__, 'pickle FAIL', type(exc).__name__, exc)
PY

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.core.basic import Atom
from sympy.codegen.ast import String, QuotedString, Comment

for cls in (String, QuotedString, Comment):
    value = cls('text')
    assert isinstance(value, Atom)
    assert value.args == ()
    assert value.func(*value.args) == value
    assert value.func(**value.kwargs()) == value
    assert value.text == 'text'
print('String atom compatibility checks passed')
PY
git diff --check
git diff -- sympy/codegen/ast.py
git status --short"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import copy, pickle
from sympy.codegen.ast import String, QuotedString, Comment
from sympy.core.basic import Atom, Basic
for cls in (String, QuotedString, Comment):
    x = cls('foo')
    print('\\n', cls.__name__)
    print('MRO:', [c.__name__ for c in cls.__mro__])
    print('args/kwargs/hash:', x.args, x.kwargs(), x._hashable_content(), hash(x))
    print('func rebuild:', x.func(*x.args) == x, x.func(*x.args) is x)
    print('copy:', copy.copy(x) == x, copy.copy(x) is x)
    print('deepcopy:', copy.deepcopy(x) == x, copy.deepcopy(x) is x)
    try:
        y=pickle.loads(pickle.dumps(x))
        print('pickle:', y == x, y is x)
    except Exception as e:
        print('pickle:', type(e).__name__, e)
print('String Atom?', isinstance(String('x'), Atom), isinstance(String('x'), Basic))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import copy, pickle
from sympy.codegen.ast import String, QuotedString, Comment
from sympy.core.basic import Atom, Basic
for cls in (String, QuotedString, Comment):
    x = cls('foo')
    print('\\n' + cls.__name__)
    print('MRO:', [c.__name__ for c in cls.__mro__])
    print('args/kwargs/hashable:', x.args, x.kwargs(), x._hashable_content())
    print('func rebuild:', x.func(*x.args) == x, x.func(*x.args) is x)
    for label, op in [('Basic.copy()', lambda: x.copy()), ('copy.copy', lambda: copy.copy(x)), ('copy.deepcopy', lambda: copy.deepcopy(x)), ('pickle', lambda: pickle.loads(pickle.dumps(x)))]:
        try:
            y=op()
            print(label, 'ok:', y == x, 'same:', y is x)
        except Exception as e:
            print(label, 'FAIL:', type(e).__name__, e)
print('\\nString Atom/Basic?', isinstance(String('x'), Atom), isinstance(String('x'), Basic))
PY"

import copy, pickle
from sympy.codegen.ast import String, QuotedString, Comment

    x = cls('foo')
    print('\\n' + cls.__name__)
    print('MRO:', [c.__name__ for c in cls.__mro__])
    print('args/kwargs/hashable:', x.args, x.kwargs(), x._hashable_content())
    print('func rebuild:', x.func(*x.args) == x, x.func(*x.args) is x)
    for label, op in [('Basic.copy()', lambda: x.copy()), ('copy.copy', lambda: copy.copy(x)), ('copy.deepcopy', lambda: copy.deepcopy(x)), ('pickle', lambda: pickle.loads(pickle.dumps(x)))]:
        try:
            y=op()
            print(label, 'ok:', y == x, 'same:', y is x)
        except Exception as e:
            print(label, 'FAIL:', type(e).__name__, e)
print('\\nString Atom/Basic?', isinstance(String('x'), Atom), isinstance(String('x'), Basic))
PY"
